home.proBannerDesc: Grow your business by reaching new customers in your area.

about.title: About Us
about.story: Founded in 2025 in Ireland, we connect trusted local professionals with people needing home services, repairs, lessons, moving, and more. Customers get fast quotes, verified reviews, and secure payments in one streamlined marketplace.
about.mission: Quality, speed and trust in every service request.
about.stats: Over 15,000 professionals • 120,000+ completed jobs • 4.7/5 average rating

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your requests, quotes and payments.

errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Join the marketplace in less than 2 minutes.
signup.verificationNote: A valid ID and business details are required before you start receiving leads.
signup.bankInfoNote: Bank details will be collected later for secure payouts.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.services: Please list at least one service.

becomeProvider.title: Earn money on your schedule - join 15,000+ professionals
becomeProvider.subtitle: Start receiving service requests from nearby customers with zero registration cost.

benefits.title: Why providers join
benefits.chooseJobs: Choose the jobs that fit your calendar
benefits.reviews: Build your reputation with verified reviews

form.bankInfo: Bank information will be requested during payout setup.

serviceDetail.description1: Service usually includes planning, on-site execution, cleanup and final quality checks based on your home or business needs.
serviceDetail.description2: Verified professionals arrive prepared, communicate clearly and adapt scope, materials and timing to your priorities.
serviceDetail.description3: You can request custom quotes for urgent jobs, recurring plans or advanced requirements before confirming your booking.
serviceDetail.faq1q: How quickly can I receive quotes?
serviceDetail.faq1a: Most requests receive the first quote within 30 minutes during business hours.
serviceDetail.faq2a: Profiles are checked with ID and business verification before they can receive leads.
serviceDetail.faq3q: What if I am not satisfied?
serviceDetail.faq3a: Our support team reviews each case and applies first-job money-back protection where eligible.

search.title: Search results
search.subtitle: Showing results for
search.noResults: No services or professionals matched your search.

legal.privacyBody: We process account, service request and payment data to match customers with providers, prevent fraud and improve platform reliability. Data is encrypted in transit and access is logged.
legal.termsBody: Providers are responsible for accurate service descriptions, legal compliance and timely delivery. Customers agree to share honest requirements and complete payments through platform-approved flows.
legal.cookieBody: We use essential cookies for sign-in and security, plus analytics cookies to improve search relevance, quote quality and conversion across customer and provider journeys.
